description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake decorated in a vibrant Super Mario theme. The cake is covered in light blue fondant with fondant clouds, yellow stars, and green hills wrapping around the sides, along with red and white spotted mushrooms and green pipes reminiscent of the Mario game world. On top, there is a fondant figure resembling Mario, sitting next to a yellow question block, with several yellow star-shaped toppers on sticks rising above. The cake sits on a white cake stand with a silver base. The overall appearance is playful and colorful, with detailed fondant work and a whimsical, celebratory feel. The cake is likely intended for a birthday or themed celebration.
description: A round, single-tier Super Mario-themed cake with fondant decorations, a Mario figure, and star toppers, displayed on a white cake stand.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Mario figure, yellow question block, and star toppers, with the main fondant decorations and landscape details clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the fondant mushrooms, green pipes, and hills, with the Mario figure turned slightly away and the question block more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the Mario figure and star toppers, with more of the cake's landscape and mushroom decorations visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the Mario figure from behind, with the star toppers and fondant landscape details wrapping around the cake.
